CtrlAltDefeat.ai™

Sloptastic!

The machines took the jobs.
They're not taking the pitch.
Capture territory across a 3-D geodesic globe,
outplay the AI, and prove humans still win.

Your wetware vs. the machine’s hardware.

A game 35 years in the making — conceived 1991

▶ Play Now

📱 On iPad? For full-screen play, open play.ctrlaltdefeat.ai and tap Share → Add to Home Screen.

You vs. the Machine

Every match is one human against the AI. Capture nodes, complete territories, and beat the algorithm across a spinning truncated-icosahedron football (a.k.a. soccer) pitch — before it beats you.

🌐

Play on a Globe

The whole match unfolds on a 3-D geodesic sphere — strategy in the round, not on a flat field.

🏳️

Claim Your Patch

Pick a country and claim your unique player jersey number. Your player patch is yours worldwide — change it any time.

🏆

Worldwide Leaderboards

Tournament tiers, a daily challenge, and global rankings. Every best time is on the board. Fresh daily board every night; a new tournament season every Monday — midnight Pacific.

⚡

Outsmart the AI

Speed, freeze, burn, and steal. Read the machine, break its freeze, and snatch the decisive face out from under it.

📅

Daily Challenge

One fresh seed a day for the whole world — same board for everyone. Beat today's #1.

🖥️

Desktop & Tablet

Runs in any modern browser on desktop and tablet — no install, no download, just open and play.

Controls

Play your way — grab a controller, tap the screen, or stick to the keyboard.

🎮

Gamepad

Pair or plug in an Xbox, PlayStation, or Switch / 8BitDo controller — Bluetooth or USB.

  • D-pad / left stick — move across nodes
  • A · B · X · Y — fire your four powerups
  • Back / Select — pause & menus
👆

Touchscreen

Built for tablets — every move is a tap or a swipe away.

  • Tap a node — move & capture there
  • Swipe — quick directional move
  • Two-finger drag — spin the globe
  • On-screen buttons — fire powerups
⌨️

Keyboard

Mouse & keyboard on any desktop browser.

  • Arrow keys — move across nodes
  • Z · X · C · V — speed, slow, freeze, steal
  • Esc — pause & menus

In the Match

The signature globe, the worldwide leaderboards, and the football (a.k.a. soccer) pitch — pick your kit and kick off.

Pick a side. Pick humanity.

Join the waitlist — and we'll email you when it's humans-vs-humans.
Defeating AI is just the beginning.

⚽ You're on the list — see you on the pitch, human.
